title: Check 6 — Pricing Model by Category
description: Reference data for Check 6: how pricing is validated per category (Summary: Checks 3–6 Category Applicability). Informs 6.1–6.6 which baseline to use (quote, contract, rate card).

IT Hardware.description: Discount off list price; compare PR to quote/catalog.

IT.description: Same as IT Hardware when category_l1 is IT.

Professional Services.description: RATE CARD: Role-based rates; T&M hourly/daily.

Construction.description: Trade rates + prevailing wage; contract ceiling.

Direct Materials.description: Negotiated / index based; compare to quote.

Office Supplies.description: Catalog price; compare PR to quote.

Staffing.description: Bill rate + pay + markup %; rate card compliance.

category_lookup_notes: Match PR category_l1 or category_l2 against keys (case-insensitive). If no match, apply quote comparison (6.1, 6.5) and currency (6.6) only.
